models.name: Franchise (Franchisee)
models.description: Reporting to franchisor, brand standards, royalties/fees, centralized purchasing, mandatory training

models.name: Franchise (Franchisor)
models.description: Franchisee network management, fee collection, auditing, centralized training, expansion planning

models.name: Multi-store / Chain
models.description: Multi-warehouse, inter-store transfers, consolidated reporting, centralized pricing, multi-center payroll

models.name: Marketplace / Platform
models.description: Multi-vendor, sales commissions, vendor onboarding, disputes, split payments, vendor dashboard

models.name: Subscription Model
models.description: Recurring billing, plans/tiers, churn/retention, metrics (MRR, LTV, CAC), upgrade/downgrade, trials

models.name: Street Vendor / Markets
models.description: Multi-location temporary, mobile POS/offline, location changes, portable stock, municipal licenses

models.name: Vending Machines
models.description: Per-machine inventory, restocking routes, telemetry/alerts, unattended payment, per-machine reporting

models.name: Dealer / Official Distributor
models.description: Brand-imposed catalog, sales targets, factory warranties, factory orders, incentives/rappels

models.name: Worker Cooperative
models.description: Worker-members, profit sharing, assemblies/voting, cooperative accounting, share capital

models.name: Seasonal / Pop-up
models.description: Quick open/close, temporary inventory, temporary staff, temporary licenses, season profitability
